mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate reduces discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 8.0 percent signals severe labor market weakness and deteriorating corporate earnings, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in more than 65 percent of monthly observations where UNRATE exceeds the 8.0 percent threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index reflects improving factory utilization and supply-side recovery, generating short-term positive market momentum over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases of greater than 1 percent month-over-month are followed by negative 5-day returns in more than 55 percent of cases during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index readings above 260.0 trigger expectations of central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and causing negative forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL readings above 260.0 are followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 60 percent of observations across the evaluation period.

mechanism_narrative: Declining unemployment rate combined with rising total nonfarm payrolls confirms labor market tightening, boosting corporate revenue expectations and equity prices over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of falling UNRATE and rising PAYEMS yields a negative or zero Rank IC over any 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth directly increases corporate profit pools, producing positive quarterly S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDPC1 growth rates show no statistically significant correlation with 60-day forward returns (Spearman rho < 0.05) in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 100.0 baseline indicates severe supply-side contraction, triggering risk-off positioning and negative short-term equity returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO values below 100.0 are followed by positive 5-day returns in more than 65 percent of instances during contraction periods.
